name: 8links-pbn-boilerplate
description: Boilerplate Astro para sites PBN - captura referência (screenshots + HTML/CSS) de URLs e cria tema a partir disso

scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run capture-api" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:3001 --timeout 10000 && astro dev"
scripts.kill-ports: for p in 3001 4321; do lsof -ti :$p 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; echo Portas 3001 e 4321 encerradas
scripts.dev:fresh: bun run kill-ports && sleep 2 && bun run dev
scripts.check-links: bun run build && bun run scripts/check-links.ts
